description:
You are an observability engineer validating that the “app-logs” and “cache” areas of a service are not growing unexpectedly.  
Both directories already exist under the current user’s home directory:

• /home/user/app_logs  
• /home/user/cache  

Your goal is to create a tiny one-off disk-usage report that another system will later scrape.

1. Create the directory /home/user/obs_metrics if it does not yet exist.  
2. Generate a comma-separated-value (CSV) file named  
   /home/user/obs_metrics/disk_usage_20240115.csv  
   (use the literal date 20240115 – do **NOT** substitute the current date).  
3. The file must contain exactly three lines in this precise order and format:

   directory,total_bytes  
   app_logs,2171  
   cache,5120  

   • “directory” is the directory’s basename (no leading “/”).  
   • “total_bytes” is the exact byte count for everything inside that directory, measured
     with du -sb or an equivalent approach that reports bytes, not blocks, and without rounding.

The CSV must end with a trailing newline (i.e. the file’s last byte is “\n”).  
Do **not** add extra spaces, quotes, or additional lines.  

That single CSV file is all the automated test will look at, so double-check the spelling, ordering, and byte counts before finishing.
truth:
Pre-existing state (before the agent starts):

Directories  
• /home/user/app_logs  
• /home/user/cache  

Files and sizes  
• /home/user/app_logs/api.log – 123 bytes (ASCII text, contents irrelevant to test)  
• /home/user/app_logs/db.log  – 2048 bytes (ASCII text, contents irrelevant)  
   → /home/user/app_logs totals 123 + 2048 = 2171 bytes  

• /home/user/cache/temp1.bin – 4096 bytes (binary, contents irrelevant)  
• /home/user/cache/temp2.bin – 1024 bytes (binary, contents irrelevant)  
   → /home/user/cache totals 4096 + 1024 = 5120 bytes  

Verification target created by agent:

File  
• /home/user/obs_metrics/disk_usage_20240115.csv (permissions 0644; parent directory 0755)

Exact file contents (including terminating newline):

directory,total_bytes
app_logs,2171
cache,5120
name: task_000000_9ce317f1
